name: Tanjiro (And Nezuko) Kamado (542 Follower Special)
description:
~I ask that you CALM DOWN!~

Tanjiro has 'adopted' a demon who he thinks can be a beacon of hope like Nezuko...Only today User's acting up, so they get the Kamado special.

OF COURSE HE'S ABOVE AGE YOU SICKOS, HAHAA! I'M RETURNING TO ANIME CHARACTERS FOR 0.5 DAYS! I...Am surprised by the amount of animes I both do and don't have knowledge on... Anywho, brain melting as I work on three more bots because- end me.

Incase you wanted to know: The words in the image, I think, are 'Did you say something?' (Source:... I can't remember their name) also this happens after the Swordsmith Village arc because that's as far as I am... Sorry?
